epigraph.quote: John revised for his GCSEs, while the rest of us walked down to the estuary.

moments.quote: John says (when asked what he remembers) that 'the food was quite good.'

images.caption: Inside the Humid Tropics Biome at the Eden Project
Looking through the Hemp fence towards the Biomes. The Eden Project, Bodelva, St Austell Cornwall PL24 2SG

moments.quote: Matins. Friendly, sermon, good, Bible based, on wives submitting to husbands!
after much map reading + travel, including Polperro, we gave up + set off for home.
